title: paspalum sumatrense
intro: Paspalum sumatrense, also known as Sumatran grass or buffalo grass, is a tropical grass species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum sumatrense include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a paste or tincture for topical application.
